name: sub-bridge-cli
description: Local OpenAI Responses bridge for subscription-backed coding agents.

scripts.check: node --check bin/sub-bridge && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/cursor-acp.js && node --check src/cursor-models.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && bash -n install.sh && bash -n scripts/test-install.sh && npm test && npm run test:install && npm run smoke
scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js --help && node src/cli.js targets && node src/cli.js models
